The other drugs listed do not have this specific effect based on their primary mechanisms or indications mentioned here. ``` Summary:

Among the given choices, Finasteride (Option C), which inhibits 5-alpha reductase and thereby shrinks the prostate gland, stands out uniquely compared to tamsulosin, sildenafil, prazosin—all of which target different aspects without reducing prostate volume directly. ```
